campaign_promises: Advocate smart, balanced policies to address LA's housing crisis without stifling growth
Champion transit-oriented development that pairs affordable housing with transportation infrastructure
Implement new tenant protections (built on his State Assembly record)
Preserve and expand affordable housing stock in the Valley
Collaborate with law enforcement on comprehensive, community-based public safety strategies
Expand mass transit access in the San Fernando Valley
Protect immigrants and diverse communities (co-authored protections for Armenians, Assyrians, LGBTQ+ individuals)
Co-introduce motions to protect renters from extreme heat via indoor temperature standards
endorsements: Los Angeles League of Conservation Voters
campaign_platform.source_note: Campaign site adrinnazarian.com returned timeouts; platform drawn from Wikipedia and LA/search coverage
